title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; pip install ollama gives synchronous & async chat, embed, pull, list, etc.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; npm i ollama provides chat, stream, pull, etc.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package offering OllamaLLM, OllamaEmbeddings, and chat models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama servers; runs in Docker or locally.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Terminal UI client for Ollama written in Rust; offers interactive chat & model management.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like pair programmer.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU support and PVCs.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama supporting sync/async chat, embeddings, and tool use.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; gem install ollama provides chat, stream, pull, etc.

title: ollama-workflows
summary: GitHub Actions to download, cache, and spin up Ollama models in CI pipelines.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: FastAPI chat, Next.js chat, RAG, function-calling, GPU tuning, etc.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-made docker-compose stacks bundling Ollama, WebUI, Postgres, QDrant, etc.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama chat pane and can summarize selected notes.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot server that answers channel mentions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client library for Ollama with async support and native JSON mapping.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client for Ollama; go get github.com/ollama/ollama/api provides chat, pull, etc.

title: ollama-rag-qa-bot
summary: Streamlit app that ingests PDFs into Chroma and answers questions using Ollama embeddings + LLM.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that streams Ollama replies in threads and supports slash commands.
